name: Sarah M.
text: The baklava reminded me of my grandmother's kitchen in Cairo. Absolutely authentic!

name: Ahmed K.
text: Best koshari outside of Egypt. The spicy sauce is perfect. Will order again every week!

name: Fatima R.
text: Ordered the luxury sweet box for Eid and everyone was amazed. The packaging was gorgeous.

name: David L.
text: My Egyptian coworker recommended Joe Sweets and now I'm obsessed with the kunafa. Life changing.

name: Nadia S.
text: Fresh, delicious, delivered with care. The Om Ali was still warm when it arrived. Incredible service.

name: Omar F.
text: The hawawshi brought me straight back to Alexandria. Perfect seasoning, crispy bread — mama approved!
